_comment: Generic correction config template. Copy this file, replace all placeholders, and load with load_config_from_json().

mission_config._comment_instrument: SPICE instrument name (e.g. CPRS_HYSICS). Used for geolocation.

kernel_mappings._comment: Maps parameter base-names to kernel JSON files via substring matching.

correction._comment: Core correction settings. n_iterations and seed control the parameter sweep.
correction._comment_threshold: REQUIREMENTS: change when mission specs change.

parameters._comment: CONSTANT_KERNEL: vary a fixed attitude frame (roll/pitch/yaw together).
parameters.name: frame_a_roll

parameters._comment: Add _pitch and _yaw entries with the same base name to group them.
parameters.name: frame_a_pitch

parameters._comment: OFFSET_KERNEL: add a scalar bias to a telemetry column and regenerate kernel.
parameters.name: sensor_az

parameters._comment: OFFSET_TIME: shift all science timestamps by a constant.
parameters.name: time_correction

geolocation._comment: SPICE kernel paths and instrument identity for geolocation.
